summary: Comprehensive testing of Request Management System completed. All core features working correctly. Fixed one bug in MyRequests.js (SelectItem empty value error).

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'

passed_tests: Backend: Request Types CRUD - Create basic request type
Backend: Request Types CRUD - Create with custom fields
Backend: Request Types CRUD - Create with workflow steps
Backend: Request Types CRUD - Get by ID
Backend: Request Types CRUD - Update request type
Backend: Request Types CRUD - Delete request type
Backend: Request Types CRUD - Filter active only
Backend: Workflow Requests - Create workflow request
Backend: Workflow Requests - Validate required fields
Backend: Workflow Requests - Get list
Backend: Workflow Requests - Get my submissions
Backend: Workflow Requests - Get by ID
Backend: Workflow Requests - Cancel request
Backend: Workflow Requests - Delete request
Backend: File Upload - Upload step file
Backend: File Upload - Reject wrong file type
Backend: Workflow Stats - Get statistics
Frontend: Request Management dashboard loads with stats
Frontend: Admin can create Request Type with custom fields and workflow steps
Frontend: Admin can assign workflow steps to users
Frontend: Branch employee can submit new request
Frontend: Branch employee can view submitted requests (My Requests)
Frontend: Marketing team can see assigned requests
Frontend: Request detail shows workflow progress
Frontend: File upload section visible for assigned users
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct statistics
critical_code_review_comments: MyRequests.js line 116: Fixed SelectItem with empty value - changed to use 'all' as value and convert in onValueChange handler
seed_data_creation: Created test request types and workflow requests during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Request Management System fully tested. All features working: Request Types CRUD, Workflow Requests, File Uploads, Dashboard Stats. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in MyRequests.js. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_request_management.py covers all API endpoints.

features_tested.admin_create_request_type: PASS - Admin can create request types with name, description, custom fields, and workflow steps
features_tested.admin_assign_workflow_steps: PASS - Admin can assign workflow steps to specific users via dropdown
features_tested.branch_submit_request: PASS - Branch employee can submit new request with custom field values
features_tested.branch_view_requests: PASS - Branch employee can view submitted requests in My Requests page
features_tested.marketing_see_assigned: PASS - Marketing team can see requests assigned to them in Assigned Requests page
features_tested.marketing_upload_files: PASS - File upload section visible with PDF/XLSX/XLS support
features_tested.request_moves_to_next_step: PASS - Backend tested - request moves to next step after file upload
features_tested.request_marked_completed: PASS - Backend tested - request marked completed after all steps done
features_tested.dashboard_shows_stats: PASS - Dashboard shows Total, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled counts
